title: Brave at Bedtime
lesson: The dark isn't scary when you feel cozy and safe; you can be brave.
prompts: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits up on the bed hugging the teddy bear, looking a little unsure about the dark. Medium shot at eye level, a soft warm glow fills the room, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits in the mid-ground on the bed, with a slightly worried expression, still hugging the teddy bear. In the foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels beside the bed reaching toward a small night-light, smiling warmly and reassuringly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, gentle warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} leans in tucking a soft blanket around them, smiling gently. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Gentle eye-level medium shot, warm glowing light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening, the child sits up on the bed hugging a teddy bear, looking unsure about the dark, in a soft warm glow.
In the evening bedroom, the child sits on the bed hugging the teddy, a little worried, while the father kneels reaching toward a small night-light to switch it on.
In the bedroom now softly lit by the night-light, the child sits on the bed calmer, hugging the teddy, while the father leans in tucking a blanket around them.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child lies back alone on the pillow with the teddy beside them, calmer now.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child snuggles down alone under the blanket hugging the teddy with a small brave smile.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy close, content and no longer afraid of the dark.
texts: It was bedtime. You sat up in bed hugging your teddy, feeling unsure about the dark.
"I'm a little bit scared," you said. Dad knelt down and switched on a soft, glowing night-light.
The room filled with a warm, cosy glow. Dad tucked your blanket in snug and gave you a smile.
You lay back on your pillow with teddy beside you. The dark didn't feel so scary now.
You snuggled down and gave a brave little smile. "I can be brave," you whispered.
Soon you rested, calm and cosy, not afraid at all. You were safe, and you were brave.
